description.unified: Dispels negative effects from the ally with the lowest HP, healing HP of the target by ??? and HP of allies nearby equal to 40% of [the healing amount->Heal Rate].

Casts a shield on [4 ally with the highest damage dealt->all allies] that absorbs ??? DMG for [16 sec->12 sec]. While the shield is in effect, the target increases its ATK by [(added) 20%], Heal Rate by [11%->50%] and gains immunity to CC.

Attacks the target and its nearby enemies 6 times, dealing up to ??? M.DMG. [800->500] additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill. Hit targets will be blinded for [2 sec->6 sec], and take [(added) 25%] increased All DMG for [(added) 10 sec].

Reduces All DMG taken by [(added) 15%]. At the beginning of each battle, and every 15 sec, increases M.DEF of [2 allies->1 ally] with the lowest HP by ??? for [15 sec->10 sec] and heals HP of the target by [1.5% of Max HP 10 times->15%] for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: In exchange for [1000->1] additional Mana Cost, the skill targets 2 allies.

dark.unified: Healed allies take [40%->25%] reduced M.DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: In exchange for [10% P.DMG taken->1] additional Mana Cost, DMG is increased by 80%.

dark.unified: Changes the target to random enemies.

light.unified: Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by 30% for the duration of Skill.

description.unified: [Blessings of Light] Increases shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every second for 4 sec.
[Heaven's Vengeance] Target takes [(added) 20%] increased M.DMG for [(added) 10 sec], and Blind duration is increased by {0} sec.

Every 8 sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest HP by {0}% of own ATK, and increases Crit Chance by [160->300] and Crit DMG by {1}% for the [(removed) 4 allies with the] ally with the highest ATK for 8 sec.

Summons the soul of God's Authority, Rosmerta for 12 seconds, healing HP of an ally with the lowest HP by ??? every sec. Additionally, attacks the enemy with the highest ATK and enemies nearby it every sec, dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting stun for [0.5 sec->1 sec].

1.to: Duration of the soul is changed to 15 sec.
1.unified: Duration of the soul is changed to 15 sec.

2.from: Healed targets block all attacks for 5 sec.
2.to: Increases Heal Rate by 50%, and the healed target blocks all incoming attacks for 5 sec.
2.unified: Increases Heal Rate by [(added) 50%], and the healed target blocks all incoming attacks for 5 sec.
